name: Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Press the chocolate wafer crust mixture on the bottom and 1/2 inch up the sides of a 10-inch springform pan. Pre-bake as directed.
2. Place the chocolate morsels in a double boiler; bring water to a boil. Reduce heat to low and cook until the chocolate melts.
3. Beat the cream cheese at high speed with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Gradually add sugar, mixing well after each addition.
4. Stir in the melted chocolate, cocoa, and vanilla; beat until blended.
5. Stir in the sour cream, blending well.
6. Pour into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 300°F for 1 hour and 40 minutes.
8. Let cool to room temperature on a wire rack. Chill for at least 8 hours.
9. Garnish with whipped cream.
Yield: 10-12 servings
